title: Math Knowledge Example
subtitle: Concept page with definitions, intuition, examples, notation, and prerequisites.

sections.heading: Math Knowledge in use
sections.body: This math page introduces arithmetic sequences with a definition, intuition, worked example, and concept graph.

cards.title: Definition
cards.body: An arithmetic sequence has a constant difference between consecutive terms.

cards.title: Notation
cards.body: Use a_n = a_1 + (n - 1)d, where d is the common difference.

sections.heading: Worked example
sections.body: For a_1 = 3 and d = 4, the fifth term is a_5 = 3 + (5 - 1)4 = 19.

sources.label: Algebrica by Antonio Lupetti
sources.note: Example page demonstrates visible attribution behavior for Algebrica-derived math learning material.
